title: Lotus (Jun 25, 2026)
desc: Lotus is a college junior who escaped a less-than-ideal home situation! He is doing wonderfully alongside his friends now :) He is so chill. I aspire to be as chill as him one day.

title: Splatoon 3
desc: I main the Order Brush! If anyone wants to play sometime, hit me up!! I usually love to play league—especially Clam Blitz

title: Needy Girl Overdose
desc: In a world where likes are currency and every viewer is a judge, OMGkawaiiAngel—also known as KAngel—is determined to become the ultimate “Internet Angel.” Yet beneath her pastel smile and lively streams, there’s more than meets the eye.
